headline: Philip Morris Donation Highlights ESG Profile And Dividend Focus
summary: Philip Morris International (NYSE:PM) has provided a $50,000 donation to Hidden Wounds, a South Carolina based veterans mental health nonprofit. The contribution is aimed at supporting mental health services for veterans, including counseling and crisis intervention programs. This philanthropic move reflects the company’s broader social responsibility efforts beyond its core tobacco and nicotine business.
